currencies.why_it_matters: Euro strength reflects EU growth and ECB policy — affects multinational earnings.
Sterling reflects UK growth and BoE policy — affects global banks and multinationals.
JPY crosses often signal risk-on/risk-off and yield differentials.
CAD moves with oil and Bank of Canada policy — affects Canadian exporters and energy names.
AUD is commodity-sensitive — links to China demand and metals.
NZD tracks dairy/commodity cycles and risk appetite.
CHF often strengthens in risk-off — safe-haven signal.
Offshore yuan reflects China trade and tariff sensitivity.
Peso reflects EM and US-Mexico trade dynamics.
NOK links to oil and European energy markets.

tagline: Real markets, real events, real scoring, simulated portfolios.

Sterling reflects UK growth and BoE policy — affects global banks and multinationals.

CAD moves with oil and Bank of Canada policy — affects Canadian exporters and energy names.
AUD is commodity-sensitive — links to China demand and metals.
NZD tracks dairy/commodity cycles and risk appetite.
CHF often strengthens in risk-off — safe-haven signal.
Offshore yuan reflects China trade and tariff sensitivity.
Peso reflects EM and US-Mexico trade dynamics.
NOK links to oil and European energy markets.
